Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "from newstome import summarize, classify, pipeline; print\('Imports OK'\)")
Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "from newstome.config import secrets; k = secrets.anthropic_api_key; print\('key:', 'OK' if k.startswith\('sk-ant-'\) and 'paste' not in k else 'STILL PLACEHOLDER'\)")
Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "from newstome.config import secrets; k = secrets.anthropic_api_key; print\('key prefix:', k[:15], '...' if len\(k\) > 15 else ''\)")
Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "from newstome import email_send, config; print\('OK'\)")
Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "from newstome.ui import app; print\('UI OK'\)")
